description: Jaz is an accounting and finance platform for businesses and accountants. It supports workflows like invoicing, bills, reconciliation, reporting, and agent-assisted accounting tasks.
summary: jaz.ai exposes a documented authenticated HTTP API for workspace integrations and a remote MCP server at `https://mcp.jaz.ai/mcp` for Claude/ChatGPT-style agent access; no public GraphQL API or CLI was found.
